overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating a futuristic vehicle through elevated highways, neon-lit tunnels, underground parking structures, and dense urban streets. The footage transitions between bright sunlight and shadowy artificial lighting as the player drives through the cyberpunk cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated multi-lane highway with skyscraper views

agents.ego_description: driving at high speed on an elevated highway, following a yellow sports car and dark sedan through light traffic

notable_agents.action: yellow sports car driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining steady speed

entered.detail: metal guardrail running along the left side of the elevated highway
metal guardrail running along the right side of the elevated highway
tall futuristic glass and steel skyscrapers visible in the distance against the bright sky
large highway signage suspended over the road indicating directions

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a bright, sunlit elevated highway with clear views of a futuristic city skyline. The player drives behind a yellow sports car, with metal guardrails lining both sides of the road. The sky is fully visible and the lighting is harsh midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway approaching corporate district with barrier walls

events.description: enters shadow cast by tall buildings, reducing direct sunlight and creating darker lighting conditions
highway guardrails transition to solid concrete barriers as the road approaches the Arasaka corporate building

agents.ego_description: continuing to drive on the highway, now in shadow, approaching the large Arasaka building complex

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving ahead, maintaining position in the lane

entered.detail: solid concrete barrier wall replacing the metal guardrail on the left side
solid concrete barrier wall replacing the metal guardrail on the right side
massive black corporate building with the Arasaka logo visible in the distance
tall metal security fencing running along the right side of the highway

segments.scene_description: The highway continues but enters the shadow of towering buildings, creating a darker atmosphere. The metal guardrails give way to solid concrete barriers as the player approaches the imposing Arasaka corporate headquarters. The road remains elevated with security fencing visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered tunnel underpass with neon lighting and corporate signage

events.description: enters a covered tunnel underpass beneath the Arasaka building complex
lighting shifts to artificial red neon strips and ambient glow as natural sunlight disappears completely

agents.ego_description: driving through the dimly lit tunnel underpass, following traffic while navigating the enclosed space

entered.detail: large dark entrance to the covered tunnel section of the highway
illuminated corporate signage displaying 'ARASAKA' above the tunnel entrance
red and white neon lighting strips mounted on the tunnel walls
smooth concrete walls of the tunnel enclosing the roadway on the left

segments.scene_description: The player enters a dark tunnel underpass beneath the Arasaka building, marked by prominent corporate signage. The environment becomes fully enclosed with artificial red neon lighting replacing natural sunlight. The road continues straight through this covered section with smooth concrete walls on both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground parking garage with concrete pillars and ramps

events.description: exits the highway tunnel and enters an underground parking garage structure
navigates a downward ramp in the parking garage, reducing speed for the tight turn

agents.ego_description: maneuvering through the underground parking structure, taking ramps and navigating around concrete pillars

notable_agents.action: yellow sports car ahead navigating the parking garage ramps and turns

entered.detail: downward sloping concrete ramp leading to lower levels of the parking structure
thick structural concrete pillars supporting the parking garage ceiling
red illuminated signage and directional markers on the garage walls
low concrete ceiling with embedded lighting fixtures covering the parking area

segments.scene_description: The player exits the tunnel into an underground parking garage, characterized by concrete pillars, low ceilings, and artificial lighting. The vehicle navigates downward ramps and tight turns while following a yellow sports car through the enclosed parking structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: surface city street with commercial buildings and pedestrian sidewalks

events.description: exits the underground garage and emerges onto surface city streets with bright sunlight
returns to natural daylight after the dark parking garage, with sun glare visible

agents.ego_description: driving through city streets at moderate speed, navigating intersections and observing pedestrians on sidewalks

notable_agents.action: pedestrians walking along the sidewalk near commercial buildings

entered.detail: multi-story commercial and residential buildings lining the city street
urban intersection with crosswalks and traffic signals ahead
tall palm tree visible on the left side of the street
modern commercial building with large windows and signage

segments.scene_description: The vehicle emerges from the underground garage back into bright daylight on a city street lined with commercial buildings. Pedestrians appear on the sidewalks as the player drives through an urban intersection. The environment shifts from enclosed concrete to open air with palm trees and modern architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow urban canyon with graffiti walls and street-level activity

events.description: enters a narrower street section with tall walls covered in graffiti and street art
pedestrian density increases significantly with people walking on both sidewalks

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow city streets with increased pedestrian activity, passing under overpasses and through urban canyons

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking along the right sidewalk in the urban canyon

entered.detail: tall building walls creating a narrow canyon effect on the left side of the street
dark underpass ahead with overhead structure covering the road
concrete walls covered in colorful graffiti and street art
bright neon signs and digital billboards mounted on building walls

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a narrow urban canyon with graffiti-covered walls and increased pedestrian activity. The street becomes more enclosed with buildings rising on both sides, neon advertising, and an underpass ahead. The atmosphere shifts to a denser, more gritty urban environment with street-level activity.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive along an elevated highway that transforms from a bright, open cityscape into a dark, enclosed corporate underpass. It begins under a harsh midday sun, trailing a yellow sports car past metal guardrails with a clear view of the futuristic skyline. As the vehicle advances, the scene shifts into the deep shadows of towering skyscrapers, where the guardrails are replaced by solid concrete barriers near the imposing Arasaka corporate headquarters. The environment then closes in as the camera enters a dark tunnel beneath the building, where natural light vanishes and is replaced by the glow of artificial red neon signage. Finally, the road continues straight through this enclosed corridor, flanked by smooth concrete walls.

The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective as a vehicle moves from a dim underground facility into the bright, sprawling density of a futuristic city. It begins by exiting a tunnel into a concrete parking garage, navigating downward ramps and tight turns beneath low ceilings while following a yellow sports car. As the vehicle emerges from the garage, the enclosed artificial lighting gives way to bright daylight and open air, revealing a city street lined with commercial buildings, palm trees, and pedestrians. The scene then shifts into a narrow urban canyon where the architecture closes in, replacing the open sunlight with graffiti-covered walls and neon advertising. Finally, the camera drives deeper into this gritty environment, passing increased street-level activity as it approaches a looming underpass.
